title: Plugin API Descriptor
description: Describes the host functions and events available to JSON plugins at a given firmware version. Firmware CI emits the generated core (name + permission only); the SDK overlay adds descriptions, argument types, and event payloads. Both files validate against this schema.

sku.description: Product SKU this API descriptor was generated for. Uppercase alphanumeric, matching the SKU registered in the OTA server and Hub product registry.

version.description: Firmware version this descriptor was generated from, in semver format

functions.description: Host functions callable from JSON plugins via the mt-actions scripting engine

events.description: Events emitted by the device that plugins may handle in their 'events' block

permission.description: Permission token required to call this function or receive this event. Null means no permission required.

valueType.description: Primitive value type as exposed by the mt-actions scripting engine. 'bytes' maps to MTA_ARG_ARRAY (int32_t[] with values in 0-255 range) and is accepted alongside 'string' by any host function documented as taking bytes.

argDef.description: A single argument to a host function

optional.description: Whether the argument may be omitted

returnDef.description: Return value descriptor for a host function

description.description: Human-readable description of what the return value represents

payloadFieldDef.description: A single field in an event payload

description.description: Human-readable description of the payload field

functionEntry.description: A host function entry. The generated core carries 'name' and 'permission' only; the SDK overlay adds 'module', 'description', 'args', and 'returns'.

name.description: Function name as called from plugin JSON (e.g. 'log', 'bleWrite')

module.description: Documentary grouping for this function (e.g. 'ble', 'config', 'system'). Used by SDK tooling and documentation generators; has no runtime significance.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the function does

args.description: Ordered arguments to the function. Omitted when no arguments are defined.

returns.description: Return value of the function, written to $_ or the 'to' variable. Omitted or null when the function has no return value.

eventEntry.description: An event entry. The generated core carries 'name' and 'permission' only; the SDK overlay adds 'module', 'description', and 'payload'.

name.description: Event name as used in the plugin JSON 'events' block (e.g. 'tick', 'arousalChange')

module.description: Documentary grouping for this event (e.g. 'ble', 'arousal', 'system'). Used by SDK tooling and documentation generators; has no runtime significance.

description.description: Human-readable description of when the event fires

payload.description: Fields passed to the event handler. Omitted or null when there is no payload.
